title: Harris: Trump getting 'played' and 'punked' by Putin
description:
Radio host Howard Stern asked Vice President Kamala Harris why Americans would want the "kind of chaos overseas" that comes with former President Donald Trump not supporting Ukraine. "Some would say you're getting punked. If you stand in favor of somebody who's an adversary over your friends, on principles that we all agree on," Harris said on "The Howard Stern Show."
